title: The Cursed Trinkets Index [More Magic Series]
description: Are you ready to pay the price?
body:
# 📦Installation
## Required
- Or-lib
- Spell Power Attributes
- Ranged Weapon API
## Strongly Recommended
- Wizards - some trinkets grant spell power bonuses
- Paladins and Priests - some trinkets grant healing power bonuses
- The Ancient Trinkets Index - more trinkets more fun!
- The Great Alchemical Compendium - potions that grants similar bonus but only for a limited time!
# 💎 Features

Add more than 35 Trinkets that you can find in dungeons chest all over the world!

Each trinket grant different combat related bonus, but demands a price in return!


## Explore the most dangerous places!

In the most dungerous dungeons you can also find Lost sacks that when opened will give you an incredible powerfull belt or aglet!

# 🔧 Configuration
**Trinkets bonuses:**
- config/the_cursed_trinkets_index/trinkets

**Loot configs:**
- config/the_cursed_trinkets_index/loot
